mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO article_translations (article_create_date, title_en, title_zh, status, content_zh, content_en) VALUES
( #{item.articleCreateDate}, #{item.titleEn}, #{item.titleZh}, #{item.status}, #{item.contentZh}, #{item.contentEn} )
mapper.select:
select entry.id, aTranslations.title_en as title, entry.author, entry.attributes, aTranslations.content_en as cleanedContentEn, entry.link, aTranslations.content_zh as contentZh, aTranslations.title_zh as titleZh, aCategory.id as categoryId from admin_entry entry left join article_translations aTranslations on aTranslations.article_create_date = entry.id left join admin_feed feed ON entry.id_feed = feed.id left join admin_category aCategory ON feed.category = aCategory.id where entry.id in
#{id}
